decision_scope: Approve starting v0.4 implementation epics after this decision package is reviewed and merged; this package itself does not implement v0.4 runtime features.
approved_v04_vfp: Governed SkillOps delivery: signed metadata, quality gates, maintainer-controlled improvements, policy-aware recommendations, redacted support/governance diagnostics, and optional self-hosted registry contracts without automatic mutation.

repositories.role: public client, local MIT core, public docs, readiness and go/no-go gates
private registry contracts, signed SkillOps metadata, eval gates, maintainer queue lifecycle

evidence: python -m compileall -q unlimited_skills scripts tests -> passed
registry operator gates passed on blocker closure and ledger PRs
private registry focused blocker verifier passed
private registry full tests passed before ledger merge
external local-registry mode passed against the current local checkout

first_four_implementation_epics.title: Policy-aware recommendation runtime preview
first_four_implementation_epics.vfp: Users can ask for recommendation previews that combine signed catalog metadata, quality status, improvement status, team/private-pack entitlement, and enterprise policy without applying changes automatically.

first_four_implementation_epics.title: Eval-driven release gate operator workflow
first_four_implementation_epics.vfp: Registry operators can run signed eval gates, inspect pass/warning/block/override/rollback recommendations, and prepare human release decisions without auto-promotion or rollback.

first_four_implementation_epics.title: Maintainer improvement queue runtime lifecycle
first_four_implementation_epics.vfp: Maintainers can expose redacted queue status and fixed-pending-eval evidence to public clients while keeping all queue mutations human-reviewed.

first_four_implementation_epics.title: Governance dashboard and support diagnostics contract
first_four_implementation_epics.vfp: Operators can see signed, redacted governance status, entitlement/policy summaries, queue health, eval gate state, and support diagnostics without uploading prompts, skill bodies, private paths, tokens, or secrets.

required_review_gates: release owner approves this GO decision
runtime review before any public client mutation-adjacent UX
registry operator review before any private registry production flow
security and privacy review before hosted metadata expansion
PR hygiene cleanup before each release layer

residual_risks.summary: GO only authorizes implementation epics, not production rollout.
residual_risks.action: Require release gates and security/privacy review for each implementation PR.
residual_risks.fallback: Revert to NO_GO for any epic that weakens a non-negotiable boundary.

residual_risks.summary: Public fixture mode can diverge from private registry production behavior.
residual_risks.action: Keep external local-registry mode and private registry gates mandatory before release.
